l0_capability_registry.description: Canonical capability types for agent discovery (Layer 0). IANA-style registry — grow via PRs.

types.name: attestation
types.description: Can attest to claims about other agents (identity, behavior, deliverables)

types.name: delivery
types.description: Can deliver work products (code, reports, data) with verifiable receipts

types.name: scoring
types.description: Can evaluate and score other agents' trust vectors or deliverables

types.name: settlement
types.description: Can execute financial transactions (escrow, payment, staking)

types.name: custody
types.description: Can hold assets on behalf of other agents (wallets, keys, data)

types.name: discovery
types.description: Can resolve agent IDs to capability records and trust vector endpoints

types.name: revocation
types.description: Can issue revocation entries for attestations, commitments, or keys

types.name: gossip
types.description: Can propagate trust signals across agent networks

on_chain.description: Observable on-chain state, verifiable by anyone
